entities.label: Constant Function AMM
entities.description: L²-norm constant-function AMM with LP position tracking and multi-asset support.

entities.label: Central Limit Order Book
entities.description: Central limit order book with price-time priority matching and per-pair books.

entities.label: Composite World Market
entities.description: Composite world market — run multiple markets in one simulation with cross-market agents.

entities.label: Arbitrageur
entities.description: Exploits price differences between market and feed. Corrective positions.

entities.label: Informed Trader
entities.description: Trades toward belief distribution weighted by conviction. Bundle-based execution.

entities.label: Liquidity Provider
entities.description: Generic liquidity provider role shared across AMM/CLOB markets.

entities.label: Manipulator
entities.description: Strategic price manipulation with attack budgets. Measures attack success.

entities.label: Noise Trader
entities.description: Random trades within configurable size/frequency bounds. Provides background liquidity.

entities.label: Passive LP
entities.description: Deposits if yield attractive, withdraws if loss exceeds threshold.

entities.label: Rebalancing LP
entities.description: Maintains uniform portfolio weights across assets with periodic rebalancing.

entities.label: Block Clock
entities.description: Fixed block time with deterministic round progression.

entities.label: Variable Block Clock
entities.description: Variable block interval sampled per round from a distribution.

entities.label: FIFO
entities.description: First-in, first-out arrival order. Default for direct execution.

entities.label: Priority
entities.description: Sorted by compute-unit priority lamports (price × CU limit) descending. Models the Solana priority fee market.

entities.label: Random
entities.description: RNG-based shuffle. Eliminates ordering bias.

entities.label: Sandwich
entities.description: Front-run / back-run sandwich attack patterns. MEV simulation.

entities.label: Compute Unit
entities.description: Solana mainnet fee formula: 5,000 lamports per signer plus ceil(compute-unit price × CU limit / 1,000,000).

entities.label: EIP-1559
entities.description: Ethereum-like base fee + priority fee with dynamic adjustment.

entities.label: Fixed Cost
entities.description: Constant cost per action regardless of type.

entities.label: Typed Cost
entities.description: Per-action-type cost schedule. Different costs for swaps vs. LP vs. orders.

entities.label: Zero Cost
entities.description: No transaction costs. Default.

entities.label: Dynamic Fee
entities.description: Fee rate adjusts based on market conditions.

entities.label: Flat Fee
entities.description: Fixed percentage fee on trade volume.

entities.label: Spread Fee
entities.description: Fee proportional to bid-ask spread.

entities.label: Tiered Fee
entities.description: Volume-based fee tiers with breakpoints.

entities.label: Time-Weighted Fee
entities.description: Fee varies based on time since last trade.

entities.label: Composite Feed
entities.description: Combine multiple feed types per token. Weighted or fallback.

entities.label: Historical Feed
entities.description: Replay from arrays, CSV, or Parquet files. Deterministic.

entities.label: Stochastic Feed
entities.description: Stochastic process feeds — GBM, mean-reversion, jump diffusion, configurable per token.

entities.label: Batch
entities.description: Composable with queue visibility and admission policies. Supports custom ordering and cost models.

entities.label: Direct
entities.description: Network-neutral default. FIFO ordering, zero cost, no queue visibility. Suitable for protocol-level analysis without network effects.

entities.label: Ethereum-like
entities.description: Public mempool, priority ordering by gas tip, EIP-1559 costs. Full MEV simulation support.

entities.label: Solana-like
entities.description: Compute-unit pricing with priority fees and fast finality. Solana mainnet fee model.

entities.label: Delayed Information
entities.description: Agents receive state with configurable round delay. Models stale book feeds.

entities.label: Full Transparency
entities.description: Agents see complete market state. Default for simulations without information asymmetry.
